variants.name: Default (Open)
variants.html:
What is Vanilla Breeze?

A design system built on native HTML elements and CSS custom properties. No JavaScript framework required.

variants.name: Default (Closed)
variants.html:
What is Vanilla Breeze?

A design system built on native HTML elements and CSS custom properties. No JavaScript framework required.

variants.name: Accordion Group
variants.html:
Getting Started

Install via CDN or npm. No build step required.

Customising Tokens

All design tokens are CSS custom properties on :root. Override them in your stylesheet.

Browser Support

Targets evergreen browsers with graceful degradation where possible.

We had everything before us, we had nothing before us, we were all going direct to Heaven, we were all going direct the other way.

variants.name: Code Block
variants.html:
function debounce(fn, delay) {
  let timer;
  return function (...args) {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(() => fn.apply(this, args), delay);
  };
}

variants.name: Default
variants.html:
Getting Started

Vanilla Breeze provides layout primitives that handle spacing without custom CSS.

Each component composes well with others for a consistent system.

variants.name: Gap S

Quick Links

Browse the component library for layout primitives and form elements.

Check the changelog for the latest updates.

Introduction

This section covers the core layout primitives.

Installation

Include the CDN link and start using components immediately.

variants.name: Footnotes
variants.html:
The Web was invented by Tim Berners-LeeTim Berners-Lee created the World Wide Web in 1989 at CERN. as a system for scientists.

HTML provides semantic structureHTML stands for HyperText Markup Language. for web documents.

CSS enables stylingCascading Style Sheets separate content from presentation. without polluting markup.

variants.name: Math Figure with Caption
Open Command Palette
variants.html:
<command-palette>
  <command-group label="Navigation">
    <command-item value="home" data-hotkey="alt+h">Go Home</command-item>
    <command-item value="docs" data-hotkey="alt+d">Documentation</command-item>
    <command-item value="examples">Examples</command-item>
  </command-group>
  <command-group label="Actions">
    <command-item value="search" data-hotkey="meta+k">Search</command-item>
    <command-item value="theme" data-hotkey="alt+t">Toggle Theme</command-item>
  </command-group>
</command-palette>
